name: Claude Codex Settings
what_it_does: Comprehensive configuration and plugin repository for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex. Bundles 16+ pre-built plugins (Azure, GitHub, Slack, Linear, MongoDB, Supabase, Playwright, etc.), custom skills, agents, hooks for auto-formatting, and MCP server integrations. Also supports alternative LLMs via proxy configurations.
use_cases: Quickly bootstrap Claude Code with battle-tested settings and plugins
Integrate Azure (40+ services), GitHub, Slack, Linear into AI coding workflows
Add auto-formatting hooks for Python, JavaScript, Markdown, and Bash
Set up Playwright-based E2E testing through Claude Code
Configure alternative LLM backends (Z.ai GLM, Kimi K2) via proxy
Track Claude Code usage with custom statusline integration
not_for: Users who don't use Claude Code or OpenAI Codex CLI
Minimal setups - this is a comprehensive plugin ecosystem that adds significant complexity
Teams that need to audit every configuration change - lots of moving parts
best_when: You want a pre-configured, feature-rich Claude Code setup with multiple service integrations and don't want to build plugin configurations from scratch.
avoid_when: You prefer minimal configurations, don't use the bundled services (Azure, Slack, Linear, etc.), or want full control over every configuration detail.

auth.notes: Authentication varies per plugin. Azure uses CLI auth, Linear/Supabase use OAuth tokens, Slack uses API keys. Each plugin has its own setup command. No auth needed for the base configuration itself.

pricing.notes: Apache 2.0 licensed. Individual integrated services (Azure, Slack, Linear, etc.) have their own pricing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: This is primarily a configuration/plugin bundle rather than a standalone MCP server. Quality depends heavily on the individual plugins bundled. Documentation covers setup but lacks depth on troubleshooting.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Varies per plugin. Configuration installation is idempotent but individual plugin operations depend on underlying services.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires Claude Code CLI or Desktop application
Plugin dependencies vary widely (Docker, Node.js, Python, various API keys)
16+ plugins means large configuration surface area to manage
Alternative LLM proxy setup can be complex
Individual plugin setup commands must be run separately
Not a single MCP server but a collection of configurations and plugins
